label: Gating & multiplicative control

node.label: Gating & multiplicative control
node.definition: Learned gates regulate what information is written, forgotten, routed, or exposed.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Gating & multiplicative control is modeled as depending on Affine transforms & dense layers, Nonlinear activations and feeding downstream nodes such as Recurrence & feedback state, Selective state-space scan, Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts.
examples: atlas downstream link to Recurrence & feedback state
atlas downstream link to Selective state-space scan
atlas downstream link to Routing, conditional computation & mixture-of-experts
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Affine transforms & dense layers, Nonlinear activations.

dependencies.rationale: Gating & multiplicative control is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Affine transforms & dense layers.
Gating & multiplicative control is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Nonlinear activations.
